response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with a strong open-source background, but he lacks the executive-level leadership and formal IT architecture advisory experience required for this Head of Development role. Furthermore, he only possesses basic German skills, which falls critically short of the mandatory C1 proficiency needed for client-facing responsibilities in this position.
strengths: Extensive hands-on software development experience across multiple paradigms and open-source technologies.
Proven track record of system design, including microservices, event-driven platforms, and cloud infrastructure.
Demonstrated passion for mentoring and knowledge sharing through organizing workshops and training courses.
concerns: Fails to meet the mandatory German language requirement (candidate has Basic, role requires minimum C1).
Lacks executive-level leadership, formal team management, and strategic client advisory experience.
Missing explicit experience with UML modeling, enterprise IT security frameworks, and compliance management.
